parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
enum Wood {
  CEDAR
  MAHOGANY
  ALDER
}

enum Strings {
  SIX
  TWELVE
}

enum Type {
  ACOUSTIC
  ELECTRIC
}

enum Builder {
  FENDER
  GIBSON
  MARTIN
  COLLINGS
}

class GuitarSpec {
  - Builder builder
  - String model
  - Type type
  - int numStrings
  - Wood backWood
  - Wood topWood
  + getBuilder(): Builder
  + getModel(): String
  + getType(): Type
  + getNumStrings(): int
  + getBackWood(): Wood
  + getTopWood(): Wood
}

class Guitar {
  - String serialNumber
  - double price
  - Builder builder
  - String model
  - Type type
  - Wood backWood
  - Wood topWood
  + Guitar(String serialNumber, double price, Builder builder,\nString model, Type type, Wood backWood, Wood topWood)
  + getSerialNumber(): String
  + getPrice(): double
  + setPrice(double)
}

class Inventory {
  - List guitars
  + getGuitar(String serialNumber): Guitar
  + search(Guitar searchGuitar): Guitar
  + Inventory()
  + addGuitar(String serialNumber, double price, Builder builder,\nString model, Type type, Wood backWood, Wood topWood)
}

GuitarSpec <|-- Guitar : Has a\n0..*
Guitar --o Inventory : contains
@enduml
```
